description_long: This factory building features a robust brick and stone facade with large arched industrial windows and a prominent, tall smokestack rising from one side. The main roof is pitched and covered in dark material, while an attached section displays a distinctive checkered pattern on its roof, suggesting an administrative or office area. The structure is adorned with classical architectural details such as pilasters, cornices, and decorative stonework, giving it a historic, early 20th-century industrial appearance. Several rooftop vents and mechanical installations are visible, indicating active industrial use. The windows are tall and multi-paned, typical of factory buildings designed to maximize natural light. The overall impression is of a substantial, well-preserved industrial facility, likely used for manufacturing or power generation.
description: A historic brick and stone factory building with a tall smokestack, large arched industrial windows, and a checkered-roof annex. Classical architectural details and visible rooftop machinery enhance its early 20th-century industrial character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance facade with arched windows, decorative stonework, and the smokestack rising behind the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of large industrial windows, the full height of the smokestack, and the checkered-roof annex.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the checkered-roof section, the brickwork, and the smokestack's proximity to the annex.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the building, the smokestack base, and additional industrial windows.
